name: Ms. Pat
bio: Ms. Pat is an American stand-up comedian, author, and actress from Atlanta, Georgia. Drawing on a turbulent upbringing, she built a blunt, unfiltered storytelling style and created the semi-autobiographical sitcom The Ms. Pat Show. She is also the author of the memoir Rabbit.

timeline.ev: Performs her first stand-up set in Atlanta
The Ms. Pat Show premieres on BET+
Releases Netflix special Y'all Wanna Hear Something Crazy?
